name: Babe
description:
__Height:__ 218 cm (7'2")
__Affiliations:__ Baroque Works (former); New Spiders Cafe
__Bounty:__ ~!3,200,000!~

He is an officer agent of the Baroque Works, Mr. 4 has a four on his bat and shirt. He's a large, and inhumanly strong batter. He wields a four-ton bat. Being very dimwitted, he only listens to his partner's, Miss Merry Christmas, orders and rarely speaks. He has a dog named Lasso, who was once a gun who "ate" the Inu Inu no Mi (Mutt Mutt Fruit, in the English dubs), who now shoots explosive baseballs for Mr. 4 to hit at his opponents. 

After the group's dissolution, he became a pizza delivery boy, stationed at the new Spiders Cafe.
